channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Trump cancels trip by US negotiators for Iran peace talks
item.description: <![CDATA[Trump cancels trip by US negotiators for Iran peace talks]]>

item.title: A record 20 million single women own homes — even though it’s more expensive for a woman to buy a house than a man
item.description: <![CDATA[A record 20 million single women own homes — even though it’s more expensive for a woman to buy a house than a man]]>

item.title: From private suites to $20,000 seats: Luxury travelers have more ways to splurge while many passengers can’t afford economy
item.description: <![CDATA[From private suites to $20,000 seats: Luxury travelers have more ways to splurge while many passengers can’t afford economy]]>

item.title: Fernando Mendoza to make $54 million as the No. 1 NFL draft pick. Here are the other big winners — and losers.
item.description: <![CDATA[Fernando Mendoza to make $54 million as the No. 1 NFL draft pick. Here are the other big winners — and losers.]]>

item.title: ‘We are not close’: My brother says our mother left no estate when she died. How on earth can I trust him?
item.description: <![CDATA[‘We are not close’: My brother says our mother left no estate when she died. How on earth can I trust him?]]>
